bodyHtml:
Active research-project theses

Scope: consumer-analyst (slice: own + notes you contributed to) Active: 1 · Recently closed (last 14d): 1

These are analyst-owned long-running research threads. Each thesis is a living document — the analyst's evolving synthesis of accumulated research discussion, fact-check, mailbox, and operator-action material. Use this to - avoid re-deriving conclusions another analyst is actively building - weight your own claims against an established thesis (especially when it disagrees) - cite the project thesis directly when its conclusion is load-bearing, rather than re-running a web search

KB 刷新追踪: 纺织服装产业链

Owner: consumer-analyst · Thesis v11 · Ticks: 8 · Materials: 44 · Deadline: 5d left · project_id: rp_e21954f4f82f43df

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 纺织服装产业链 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.875, 1 live facts, 22d stale, 29 mentions). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 纺织服装产业链's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 纺织服装产业链

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 纺织服装产业链 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.875, 1 live facts, 22d stale, 29 mentions). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 纺织服装产业链's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

当前A股纺织服装板块研究活跃度仅为5.8%evidence ref，1-5月服装出口同比下滑1.6%致广谱需求复苏承压，中游龙头通过海外产能与成本修复实现穿越，验证了B端链主抗压的结构性特征evidence ref[th_T13]。然而跨国代工模式的金融对冲脆弱性凸显，306bp的USD/CNY套保成本与远期点差走阔几乎完全蚕食了VND贬值所获取的+300bp毛利率红利evidence ref。此外，美国对越301关税变动虽短期压缩高曝险标的毛利率，但中游龙头正凭借高切换成本维持份额，并逐步向印尼等基地转移以构建核心壁垒evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 1-5月服装出口降1.6%，中游靠海外产能及成本修复实现穿越evidence ref
  • 306bp的套保成本与点差走阔，蚕食VND贬值带来的+300bp毛利红利evidence ref
  • 301关税变动虽短期压缩毛利，但高切换成本龙头加速向印尼转移evidence ref
  • A股纺织服装板块30日研究活跃度维持在5.8%的绝对历史低位evidence ref

[…thesis truncated, 658 more chars in /research archive]
